steps.title: Divide both sides by N
steps.content:
Starting with $P = N(19 - C)$, divide both sides by $N$:
$$\frac{P}{N} = 19 - C$$

steps.title: Rearrange to solve for C
steps.content:
Subtract 19 from both sides:
$$\frac{P}{N} - 19 = -C$$

Multiply both sides by $-1$:
$$C = 19 - \frac{P}{N}$$

That matches choice D — D is correct.
